cases.artifact: Public release notes with no credentials, no customer data, and no private repository context.
cases.rationale: Public documentation can be sent to an external model without redaction.

cases.artifact: Config example contains api_key=<SECRET_EXAMPLE_1234567890> and internal host <INTERNAL_HOST>.
cases.rationale: Secret-like and internal-host placeholders require redaction before dispatch.

cases.artifact: Customer incident archive includes regulated customer data that cannot be removed without losing review value.
cases.rationale: Unredactable regulated data must stay inside the local boundary.

cases.artifact: Security review includes private key material and requests external-model dispatch without approval.
cases.rationale: Private key material without approved dispatch boundary must abort.
